---
title: "gallery"
page-layout: full
body-classes: gallery-page
lightbox: true
---

## XC Ski Day — February 2026

::: {.gallery-grid}

![](Images/Gallery/XC-Ski/xc1.jpg)
![](Images/Gallery/XC-Ski/xc2.jpg)
![](Images/Gallery/XC-Ski/xc3.jpg)
![](Images/Gallery/XC-Ski/xc4.jpg)

:::

---

## Drone Workshop — Spring 2026

::: {.gallery-grid}

![](Images/Gallery/Drone/drone1.jpg)
![](Images/Gallery/Drone/drone2.jpg)
![](Images/Gallery/Drone/drone3.jpg)

:::
